"""Main application module"""

import logging
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Union

from exceptions import InvalidItemError

# Configure logging
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format="%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s",
    filename="logs/app.log",
    filemode="w",
)

    """Raised when an item is invalid."""
    pass
